mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM LINE WHERE line_id = #{lineId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT line_id AS lineId, phone AS phoneNumber FROM LINE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY CASE WHEN line_id = #{lineId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, line_id ASC

SELECT l.individual_threshold AS individualThreshold, l.is_threshold_active AS isThresholdActive, p.basic_data_amount AS thresholdMaxValue, (p.basic_data_amount - l.remaining_data) AS thresholdMinValue FROM LINE l JOIN PLAN p ON l.plan_id = p.plan_id WHERE line_id = #{lineId}

SELECT l.line_id AS lineId, l.phone AS phone, u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, u.email AS email FROM LINE l JOIN USERS u ON u.user_id = l.user_id WHERE l.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND RIGHT(REPLACE(l.phone, '-', ''), 4) = #{phoneSuffix} ORDER BY l.line_id ASC
SELECT line_id AS lineId, phone AS phoneNumber FROM LINE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
